title: Classification of Digital Health System Categories v1 Schema
description: JSON Schema for Classification of Digital Health System Categories v1 ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions.
narrative: This schema validates codes for the Classification of Digital Health System Categories v1 ValueSet. Display values are available at ValueSet-CDSCv1.displays.json. System URI mappings are available at ValueSet-CDSCv1.system.json.
